summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned: this shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled by the fix artifact, and the hydrated refs are independent open PRs needing normal maintainer review or author follow-up. Five listed candidates were not present in the compacted preflight item matrix, so those are scoped needs_human for rehydration rather than closure.
